libuninameslist-20190701.patch

* Update to 20190701
* Update Makefile: take maintainership, add LICENSE, use GitHub, add options, remove unneeded parts
* Update distinfo
* Update pkg-descr
* Update pkg-plist

The development appears to have moved from Sourceforge to GitHub in 2013.
